message:
feat: add FlexTime type for flexible timestamp parsing from Agent Mail

internal/agentmail/types.go:
- Add FlexTime wrapper type around time.Time with custom JSON unmarshaling
  that handles ISO8601 timestamps with or without timezone suffixes
- Agent Mail server sometimes returns bare timestamps (e.g., "2025-01-29T14:45:23.123456")
  which break Go's standard time.Time JSON unmarshaling that expects RFC3339
- FlexTime tries RFC3339, RFC3339Nano, and bare ISO8601 formats in order,
  assuming UTC for bare timestamps as a fallback
- Update Agent, Message, and Project structs to use FlexTime instead of time.Time
  for InceptionTS, LastActiveTS, CreatedTS, and CreatedAt fields

internal/agentmail/*.go, internal/cli/*.go, internal/coordinator/*.go,
internal/handoff/*.go, internal/robot/*.go, internal/tui/*.go, internal/watcher/*.go:
- Update all call sites to use FlexTime.Time when accessing the underlying
  time.Time value for comparisons, formatting, and calculations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -268,7 +268,7 @@ func runMailInbox(cmd *cobra.Command, client mailInboxClient, session string, se
 					ID:          msg.ID,
 					Subject:     msg.Subject,
 					From:        msg.From,
-					CreatedTS:   msg.CreatedTS,
+					CreatedTS:   msg.CreatedTS.Time,
 					Importance:  msg.Importance,
 					AckRequired: msg.AckRequired,
 					Kind:        msg.Kind,

@@ -2304,7 +2304,7 @@ func loadRecoveryMessages(ctx context.Context, sessionName, workingDir string) (
 			Subject:    m.Subject,
 			Body:       m.BodyMD,
 			Importance: m.Importance,
-			CreatedAt:  m.CreatedTS,
+			CreatedAt:  m.CreatedTS.Time,
 		})
 	}

@@ -873,7 +873,7 @@ func buildReservationTransfer(opts GenerateHandoffOptions, projectKey string, re
 			PathPattern: r.PathPattern,
 			Exclusive:   r.Exclusive,
 			Reason:      r.Reason,
-			ExpiresAt:   r.ExpiresTS,
+			ExpiresAt:   r.ExpiresTS.Time,
 		})
 	}
 	return transfer
